sentence: 他在社交媒体上发了一组图，展示这次旅行。
pinyin: Tā zài shè jiāo méi tǐ shàng fā le yī zǔ tú, zhǎn shì zhè cì lǚ xíng.
english: He posted a set of pictures on social media showing this trip.

meaning: non-ferrous metals (all metals excluding iron, chromium, manganese and
sentence: 铜和铝都属于有色金属。
pinyin: Tóng hé lǚ dōu shǔ yú yǒu sè jīn shǔ.
english: Copper and aluminum are both non-ferrous metals.

sentence: 大一新生都要修一门经济学概论课。
pinyin: Dà yī xīn shēng dōu yào xiū yī mén jīng jì xué gài lùn kè.
english: All first-year university students are required to take an introductory economics course.

meaning: 1. to seek knowledge; 2. to study; 3. to attend college
sentence: 他去北京求学，希望考上名校。
pinyin: Tā qù Běi jīng qiú xué, xī wàng kǎo shàng míng xiào.
english: He went to Beijing to study, hoping to get into a top university.

meaning: 1. to fall back; 2. to return to low level after a rise (in water leve
sentence: 天气变凉后，蔬菜价格开始回落。
pinyin: Tiānqì biàn liáng hòu, shūcài jiàgé kāishǐ huíluò.
english: After the weather turned cool, vegetable prices started to fall back.

sentence: 这款游戏用了三维画面，很逼真。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yóuxì yòng le sān wéi huàmiàn, hěn bīzhēn.
english: This game uses 3D graphics and looks very realistic.

sentence: 农民在地里施了化肥，庄稼长得很好。
pinyin: Nóngmín zài dì lǐ shīle huàféi, zhuāngjia zhǎng de hěn hǎo.
english: The farmer applied chemical fertilizer to the field and the crops grew well.

meaning: submit an expense account; apply for reimbursement; write off
sentence: 出差的费用记得留发票，回来可以报销。
pinyin: Chūchāi de fèiyòng jìde liú fāpiào, huílái kěyǐ bàoxiāo.
english: Remember to keep receipts for your business trip expenses so you can get reimbursed when you return.

sentence: 她的红色连衣裙在人群中引人注目。
pinyin: Tā de hóngsè liányīqún zài rénqún zhōng yǐn rén zhù mù.
english: Her red dress was eye-catching in the crowd.

sentence: 明天冷空气来了会降温。
pinyin: Míngtiān lěng kōngqì lái le huì jiàngwēn.
english: Tomorrow's cold air will bring a drop in temperature.

sentence: 这座大桥的造价超过了十亿元。
pinyin: Zhè zuò dà qiáo de zào jià chāo guò le shí yì yuán.
english: The construction cost of this bridge exceeded one billion yuan.

sentence: 手机支付非常快捷，不用带钱包。
pinyin: Shǒujī zhīfù fēicháng kuàijié, bù yòng dài qiánbāo.
english: Mobile payment is very quick and convenient — no need to carry a wallet.

sentence: 他每周参加一次读书沙龙。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu cān jiā yī cì dú shū shā lóng.
english: He attends a book salon once a week.

sentence: 最近燃油价格涨了不少。
pinyin: Zuìjìn rángyóu jiàgé zhǎng le bù shǎo.
english: Fuel oil prices have gone up quite a bit recently.

meaning: 1. to donate; 2. to offer (aid); 3. contribution; 4. donation
sentence: 很多人捐助了灾区。
pinyin: Hěn duō rén juānzhù le zāiqū.
english: Many people donated aid to the disaster area.

sentence: 这两个家族有深厚的渊源。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng gè jiāzú yǒu shēnhòu de yuānyuán.
english: These two families have deep-rooted connections.

sentence: 她在舞台上展现出了迷人的风采。
pinyin: Tā zài wǔtái shang zhǎnxiàn chū le mírén de fēngcǎi.
english: She showed off her captivating grace on the stage.

sentence: 孩子五岁就开始学识字了。
pinyin: Háizi wǔ suì jiù kāishǐ xué shí zì le.
english: The child started learning to read at age five.

sentence: 医院刚进了一批先进的外科器械。
pinyin: Yīyuàn gāng jìnle yì pī xiānjìn de wàikē qìxiè.
english: The hospital just received a batch of advanced surgical instruments.

meaning: 1. to repay a favor; 2. to give back; 3. feedback
sentence: 为了回馈老顾客，店里推出了会员优惠活动。
pinyin: Wèile huíkuì lǎo gùkè, diàn lǐ tuīchūle huìyuán yōuhuì huódòng.
english: To give back to loyal customers, the store launched a member discount campaign.

meaning: 1. length (of a piece of writing); 2. space occupied on a printed page
sentence: 这篇文章篇幅太长，建议删减一些。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng piānfú tài cháng, jiànyì shānjǎn yīxiē.
english: This article is too long; I suggest cutting some of it down.

meaning: 1. to exhibit at or take part in a trade show etc
sentence: 我们公司今年第一次参展，带来了几款新产品。
pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī jīnnián dì yī cì cān zhǎn, dài lái le jǐ kuǎn xīn chǎnpǐn.
english: Our company is exhibiting for the first time this year, bringing several new products.

meaning: migrant worker (who moved from a rural area of China to a city to find
sentence: 很多民工春节前会赶回老家。
pinyin: Hěn duō míngōng Chūnjié qián huì gǎn huí lǎojiā.
english: Many migrant workers rush back to their hometowns before the Spring Festival.

sentence: 我小时候经常住在外婆家。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎoshíhòu jīngcháng zhù zài wàipó jiā.
english: I often stayed at my grandma's house when I was little.

sentence: 你帮了我这么大的忙，非常感谢！
pinyin: Nǐ bāng le wǒ zhème dà de máng, fēicháng gǎnxiè!
english: You've helped me so much — I'm extremely grateful!

sentence: 车站以西两公里就是我家。
pinyin: Chēzhàn yǐ xī liǎng gōnglǐ jiù shì wǒ jiā.
english: My home is two kilometers to the west of the station.

sentence: 他去商业银行开了一个储蓄账户。
pinyin: Tā qù shāngyè yínháng kāi le yīgè chǔxù zhànghù.
english: He opened a savings account at a commercial bank.

sentence: 她加入了学校的合唱团。
pinyin: Tā jiārù le xuéxiào de héchàngtuán.
english: She joined the school choir.

sentence: 国际条约明令禁止研发生物武器。
pinyin: Guójì tiáoyuē mínglìng jìnzhǐ yánfā shēngwù wǔqì.
english: International treaties explicitly prohibit the development of biological weapons.

sentence: 信差骑着自行车把包裹送到了门口。
pinyin: Xìnchā qí zhe zìxíngchē bǎ bāoguǒ sòng dào le ménkǒu.
english: The messenger rode a bicycle to deliver the parcel to the door.

sentence: 父母不应该用打骂的方式教育孩子。
pinyin: Fùmǔ bù yīnggāi yòng dǎmà de fāngshì jiàoyù háizi.
english: Parents should not use beating and scolding to discipline children.

sentence: 这里的水深有三米，小心不要下水。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ de shuǐ shēn yǒu sān mǐ, xiǎoxīn bù yào xià shuǐ.
english: The water depth here is three meters — be careful not to go in.

sentence: 法律保护公民的财产权不受侵犯。
pinyin: Fǎlǜ bǎohù gōngmín de cáichǎnquán bù shòu qīnfàn.
english: The law protects citizens' property rights from infringement.

sentence: 他爬到了山的顶端，俯瞰整个城市。
pinyin: Tā pá dào le shān de dǐngduān, fǔkàn zhěnggè chéngshì.
english: He climbed to the summit and looked down over the entire city.

sentence: 他说话太快，我完全听不懂。
pinyin: Tā shuōhuà tài kuài, wǒ wánquán tīng bù dǒng.
english: He speaks too fast; I can't understand a word he says.

sentence: 他买了一全套厨具。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī quántào chújù.
english: He bought a complete set of kitchen utensils.

sentence: 街上有人在发传单。
pinyin: Jiē shàng yǒu rén zài fā chuándān.
english: Someone was handing out fliers on the street.

sentence: 他尽量少吃肉类。
pinyin: Tā jǐnliàng shǎo chī ròulèi.
english: He tries to eat as little meat as possible.

sentence: 中国大部分地区属于温带气候。
pinyin: Zhōngguó dàbùfen dìqū shǔyú wēndài qìhòu.
english: Most of China has a temperate climate.

sentence: 他背部有点酸痛。
pinyin: Tā bèibù yǒudiǎn suāntòng.
english: His back is a little sore.

meaning: 1. to be purely; 2. pure and simple; 3. sheer; 4. outright
sentence: 这件事纯属误会。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì chúnshǔ wùhuì.
english: This matter is purely a misunderstanding.

sentence: 农民开着拖拉机下地干活。
pinyin: Nóngmín kāizhe tuōlājī xià dì gànhuó.
english: The farmer drove a tractor out to the fields to work.

sentence: 她今天的穿戴很整洁。
pinyin: Tā jīntiān de chuāndài hěn zhěngjié.
english: Her dress today is very neat and tidy.

sentence: 厨房里的器具都洗干净了。
pinyin: Chúfáng lǐ de qìjù dōu xǐ gānjìng le.
english: All the kitchen utensils have been washed clean.

sentence: 山上层层梯田很壮观。
pinyin: Shān shàng céngcéng tītián hěn zhuàngguān.
english: The layer upon layer of terraced fields on the mountain is spectacular.

sentence: 物理课上讲到了力场的概念。
pinyin: Wùlǐ kè shàng jiǎngdào le lìchǎng de gàiniàn.
english: The concept of a force field was covered in physics class.

sentence: 这种过度焦虑已经是病态了。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng guòdù jiāolǜ yǐjīng shì bìngtài le.
english: This kind of excessive anxiety has already become an abnormal state.

meaning: 1. main line (of communication); 2. main thread (of a plotline or conc
sentence: 这部小说的主线是兄弟情谊。
pinyin: Zhè bù xiǎoshuō de zhǔxiàn shì xiōngdì qíngyì.
english: The central theme of this novel is brotherly bond.

sentence: 她在大学学的是社会科学。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xué de shì shèhuì kēxué.
english: She studied social sciences at university.

meaning: 1. games (such as chess, dice etc); 2. gambling; 3. contest
sentence: 两家公司之间的博弈越来越激烈。
pinyin: Liǎng jiā gōngsī zhī jiān de bóyì yuèláiyuè jīliè.
english: The contest between the two companies is getting increasingly fierce.
